patches.rationale: Dome Tier 1 coherence rule requires ≥3-station r>0.5 coherence. BOU-2017 is single-station. Adding parenthetical referencing Meza et al. 2021 multi-station INTERMAGNET ensemble (already cited two paragraphs earlier) pre-empts the defender retreat that single-station evidence doesn't satisfy the rule. Also absorbs H3 (uncited BOU-2017 Chapman-coherence claim) by referencing the same multi-station corpus.
